mapper.delete: update organism set germ = null, fungus = null, animal = null, phage = null, detect_time= null, exist_content = 0 where exception_area = #{site};
update mental set sodium = null, mercury = null, calcium = null, zinc = null, magnesium = null, detect_time = null, exist_content = 0 where exception_area = #{site};
update radiation set ray1 = null, ray2 = null, thorium = null, radium = null, uranium = null, detect_time = null, exist_content = 0 where exception_area = #{site};
mapper.select: select site_id, sulfate, nitrate, permanganate, conductivity, detect_time from dissolved_oxygen
